brief: A 16-second viral-style video. Set in a bustling construction site with structural beams and cranes. Mochi (grey tabby) is the site supervisor in a high-vis vest, trying to maintain order. Ronnie (ginger tabby) is a clumsy worker who causes a series of goofy accidents (tripping, dropping things), leading to a funny but intense cat-play-fight finale. The video ends with Mochi looking directly at the camera with a 'totally done' expression of exasperation.
storyboard_rules: Shot 1: ESTABLISHING - wide shot of construction site. Mochi (supervisor) is visible.
Shot 2: REACTION - Mochi watches Ronnie's clumsiness.
Shot 3: ACTION - Shot-specific close-up on Ronnie tripping over pipes. NO humans.
Shot 4-7: ESCALATION - Sequence of accidents leading to the fight.
Shot 8: RESOLUTION - Mochi's direct-to-camera exasperated look.
